A small coastal town on [[Kabal/Legends|Kabal]], '''Palisade''' was unaffected by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] bombardment around [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]]. The town was the location of eccentric businessman and big-game hunter [[Tyro Viveca/Legends|Tyro Viveca's]] estate.<ref name="FP" />

''[[Asaari Wind|Spiraling Shape]]'' touched down at [[Docking Pad P13]] while [[Cecil Noone]] met with Viveca to offload a stolen [[Hapan]] [[Gun of Command]]. While Noone did this, his cohorts circulated through the town, trying to scavenge needed supplies. At one shop, the [[Tynnan/Legends|Tynnan]] demolitions expert [[Dawson (Tynnan)|Dawson]] found three [[Quay novelty toy]]s, much to his delight, and the chagrin of partner [[Kels Turkhorn]].<ref name="FP" />
